_mode_comment: paper = simulated fills in local ledger. live = route orders to the configured broker (see broker section).

broker.name: trading212
broker._guardrails: t212_environment demo|live. live_orders_enabled MUST be true to send real orders (default false = dry-run, logs intended orders only). Trading 212's API cannot access cards/deposits/withdrawals. Fractional shares supported when top-level fractional_shares is true. Every order checked against max_order_value_usd. Set t212_api_key in data/secrets.json or the T212_API_KEY secret.

buying._sizing_note: FULL-AUTO but SELECTIVE (per learnings 2026-07-10): max_buys_per_week 4 (tune showed 100% of combos worse at higher freq) and min_composite_score 5.5 (above the single-insider ceiling of 5.0, so a candidate needs a 2nd corroborating signal — not insider alone). Hard vetoes still protect every entry. Before live: cut max_position_usd to ~45.

_user_watchlist_note: Manual watchlist DISABLED — the bot trades purely on API-driven signals + scoring + confluence. No hand-picked tickers.

wildcard._note: Ring-fenced speculative sleeve: sub-$1 r/pennystocks names in the 20-80c band, tiny whole-share bets. STILL must pass the dilution + spread vetoes and a research/intel quality gate (require_research_ok). Wider stop/take-profit than the core (penny stocks swing hard). Separate budget from the core book. Lottery-ticket money by design — keep max_position_usd small.

earnings._note: Earnings within avoid_earnings_days (2) = hard veto (too close to hold through). Earnings 3-15 days out + positive momentum/news = catalyst bonus. Positions are force-sold 1 day before earnings to avoid the binary event.

learning._auto_tuning_note: auto_apply_tuning: overnight job auto-applies the best ROBUST stop/take-profit region from the tune sweep, clamped to safe bounds (stop 8-15%, TP 15-40%). Never touches hard vetoes or position caps.

_fractional_note: Trading 212's API supports fractional (decimal) share quantities. true = size positions to exact dollar amounts (4dp); false = whole shares only. With fractional on, max_position_usd is deployed precisely and expensive names are reachable.
_realistic_fills_note: Paper + backtest fills pay the real bid/ask spread (buy at ask, sell at bid) — Alpaca quote when available, else estimated by price tier (<$1=4%, <$5=2%, else 0.8% round-trip). Makes paper results predict LIVE reality. Set false only to compare against optimistic last-price fills.
_force_regime_note: Overrides the research/quant regime blend. 'risk_on' = full-auto aggressive (lowest buy threshold, widest stops). Set null to restore the adaptive conservative blend. Hard vetoes always apply regardless.
